"'''Han Solo vs. the Death Star'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Sterling Hershey]] in [[2004]]. It adapts the scene from [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] when [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] charges the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] during the [[Rescue of Princess Leia/Legends|rescue]] of the princess for the miniature game format.
